metric_definitions.recall@k: Mean block-level evidence recall: covered gold_block_ids in top-k chunks divided by all gold_block_ids.
metric_definitions.hit_rate@k: Mean query-level hit rate: at least one gold evidence block appears in top-k chunks.
metric_definitions.full_recall_rate@k: Mean query-level complete evidence coverage: all gold evidence blocks appear in top-k chunks.
metric_definitions.mrr: Mean reciprocal rank of the first chunk containing any gold evidence block.
metric_definitions.ndcg@5: Binary chunk-relevance nDCG: a chunk is relevant if it contains at least one gold evidence block.
